ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the indicator belongs to */,
  "child_mortality_rate" REAL /* Child mortality rate */,
  "exports" REAL /* Exports */,
  "imports" REAL /* Imports */,
  "income" REAL /* Income */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the economic data */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "public_debt" REAL /* Public debt as a percentage of GDP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the indicator belongs to */,
  "health_score" REAL /* Health score */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy */,
  "total_fertility_rate" REAL /* Total fertility rate */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the health data */,
  "physicians_per_1000" REAL /* Number of physicians per 1000 people */,
  "hospital_beds_per_1000" REAL /* Number of hospital beds per 1000 people */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Health expenditure as a percentage of GDP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the cluster belongs to */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "cluster_description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the cluster was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cluster_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster assignment */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the assignment belongs to */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster the country is assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the country was assigned to the cluster */,
  "assignment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cluster assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_assignments_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_assignments_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_per_capita" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP per capita */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the GDP per capita belongs to */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the GDP per capita data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_per_capita_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the country data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the country data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research paper */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who published the paper */,
  "paper_title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper */,
  "paper_content" TEXT /* Content of the research paper */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the paper was published */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the research paper */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_papers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_comments_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES research_papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper the rating belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_ratings_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES research_papers ("paper_id")
)
